Use the top selectors to set the active site and the Grafana time picker to change the analysis window.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(total_facility_power_w)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
FROM sustainability_kpi_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(total_co2_kg)::NUMERIC, 3) AS value
FROM sustainability_kpi_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(ppw)::NUMERIC, 3) AS value
FROM sustainability_kpi_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(l.power_w), 0)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(l.cpu_usage), 0)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(l.inlet_temp_c), 0)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::NUMERIC AS value
FROM active_alerts
WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR room_name = ${room:raw})
  AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR rack_name = ${rack:raw})
  AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(l.carbon_kg), 0)::NUMERIC, 3) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::NUMERIC AS value
            FROM assets a
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(l.power_w), 0)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(l.cpu_usage), 0)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(l.inlet_temp_c), 0)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(l.carbon_kg), 0)::NUMERIC, 3) AS value
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})

SELECT
              $__timeGroupAlias(tm.ts, '5m'),
              'Power Draw' AS metric,
              ROUND(SUM(tm.power_w)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM telemetry_metrics tm
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE $__timeFilter(tm.ts) AND (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})
            GROUP BY 1
            ORDER BY 1

SELECT
              $__timeGroupAlias(tm.ts, '5m'),
              'Average CPU' AS metric,
              ROUND(AVG(tm.cpu_usage)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
            FROM telemetry_metrics tm
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE $__timeFilter(tm.ts) AND (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})
            GROUP BY 1
            ORDER BY 1

SELECT
              bucket AS time,
              metric,
              value
            FROM (
              SELECT
                $__timeGroup(tm.ts, '5m') AS bucket,
                'Inlet Temp' AS metric,
                ROUND(AVG(tm.inlet_temp_c)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
              FROM telemetry_metrics tm
              JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
              WHERE $__timeFilter(tm.ts) AND (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})
              GROUP BY 1
              UNION ALL
              SELECT
                $__timeGroup(tm.ts, '5m') AS bucket,
                'Outlet Temp' AS metric,
                ROUND(AVG(tm.outlet_temp_c)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
              FROM telemetry_metrics tm
              JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
              WHERE $__timeFilter(tm.ts) AND (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})
              GROUP BY 1
            ) s
            ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT
  a.rack_name AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(l.power_w)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value
FROM latest_asset_metrics l
JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
  AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
GROUP BY a.rack_name
ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT
  ts AS "Last seen",
  room_name AS "Room",
  rack_name AS "Rack",
  asset_name AS "Asset",
  severity AS "Severity",
  rule_name AS "Rule",
  message AS "Message"
FROM active_alerts
WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR room_name = ${room:raw})
  AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR rack_name = ${rack:raw})
  AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR asset_name = ${server:raw})
ORDER BY ts DESC, severity DESC
LIMIT 25

SELECT
              l.ts AS "Last update",
              a.room_name AS "Room",
              a.rack_name AS "Rack",
              a.asset_name AS "Server",
              a.asset_type AS "Type",
              ROUND(l.cpu_usage::NUMERIC, 1) AS "CPU %",
              ROUND(l.power_w::NUMERIC, 0) AS "Power W",
              ROUND(l.outlet_temp_c::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Outlet C",
              l.status_level AS "Status",
              l.operational_state AS "State"
            FROM latest_asset_metrics l
            JOIN assets a USING (asset_id)
            WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR a.room_name = ${room:raw})
AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR a.rack_name = ${rack:raw})
AND (${server:raw} = 'All' OR a.asset_name = ${server:raw})
            ORDER BY
              CASE l.status_level
                WHEN 'critical' THEN 1
                WHEN 'warning' THEN 2
                ELSE 3
              END,
              l.cpu_usage DESC
            LIMIT 25

list.name: data_centre
list.label: Data Centre
list.definition: SELECT dc_name AS __text, quote_literal(dc_name) AS __value FROM data_centre_sources WHERE user_visible = TRUE ORDER BY display_order, dc_name
list.query: SELECT dc_name AS __text, quote_literal(dc_name) AS __value FROM data_centre_sources WHERE user_visible = TRUE ORDER BY display_order, dc_name

list.name: room
list.label: Room
list.definition: SELECT room_name AS __text, quote_literal(room_name) AS __value FROM rooms ORDER BY room_name
list.query: SELECT room_name AS __text, quote_literal(room_name) AS __value FROM rooms ORDER BY room_name

list.name: rack
list.label: Rack
list.definition:
SELECT rack_name AS __text, quote_literal(rack_name) AS __value
FROM racks
JOIN rooms USING (room_id)
WHERE ${room:raw} = 'All' OR rooms.room_name = ${room:raw}
ORDER BY rack_name
list.query:
SELECT rack_name AS __text, quote_literal(rack_name) AS __value
FROM racks
JOIN rooms USING (room_id)
WHERE ${room:raw} = 'All' OR rooms.room_name = ${room:raw}
ORDER BY rack_name

list.name: server
list.label: Server
list.definition:
SELECT asset_name AS __text, quote_literal(asset_name) AS __value
FROM assets
WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR room_name = ${room:raw})
  AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR rack_name = ${rack:raw})
ORDER BY asset_name
list.query:
SELECT asset_name AS __text, quote_literal(asset_name) AS __value
FROM assets
WHERE (${room:raw} = 'All' OR room_name = ${room:raw})
  AND (${rack:raw} = 'All' OR rack_name = ${rack:raw})
ORDER BY asset_name
